'''âsh-z-z-r''' ('''kashazzeroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:luckbox|luckbox]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-z-z-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:luckbox|luckbox]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-z-z-r
|-
! Lemma
| kashazzeroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishazeroko|thishazeroko]] || [[word:jishazeroko|jishazeroko]] || [[word:shishazeroko|shishazeroko]] || [[word:kishazeroko|kishazeroko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
